summary: Comprehensive FREE11 user journey audit completed successfully. All major features tested with BETA02 invite code. Perfect Dream11-style black backgrounds, team-colored avatars, and green CTAs implemented across all pages. Backend APIs 100% functional with all 23 tests passing.

functional_apis.status: ALL APIs working perfectly - 23/23 tests passed
highlights: BETA02 invite code working (fixed from previous BETA01 limit issue)
Cricket predictions, shop products, mini-games operational
Daily check-in, notification system, invite system functional
Coins system and transaction tracking working

ui_bugs.issue: Date of birth field selector issue - form partially filled but date field not accessible
ui_bugs.workaround: Login flow working perfectly as alternative

design_issues.issue: Bottom navigation not detected on desktop view - may be mobile-only
design_issues.note: Top navigation working perfectly as primary navigation

passed_tests: Landing page with perfect black background and FREE11 branding
Login flow working with admin credentials
Dashboard loads with Dream11-style design - black backgrounds, team colors
User stats display (100000 coins balance, Level 5 Legend status)
Progress to Next Reward section with green styling
Live Cricket Prediction with team-colored avatars (CSK=yellow, MI=blue)
Ball-by-ball prediction buttons working (8 prediction options)
Match winner prediction functional (CSK vs MI buttons)
Cricket prediction success feedback and stats tracking
Shop page with black background and category tabs
Earn Coins page with mini-game cards visible
Profile page with user info and logout functionality
Card Games page with 3 game options (Rummy, Teen Patti, Poker)
Invite Friends with referral link, WhatsApp sharing, referral rewards display
Consistent Dream11-style black backgrounds across all pages
Green CTA buttons and progress bars throughout
Top navigation working across all pages
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (all APIs functional), Frontend: 95% (minor registration form field issue)
